case_title: ORLANDO MORALES-JUAREZ VS. SAARMAN, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF DEMURRER (TRANSACTION ID # 15145060) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAARMAN, LLC SAARMAN CONSTRUCTION, LTD
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION & MOTION TO ST... (TRANSACTION ID # 15145060) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAARMAN, LLC SAARMAN CONSTRUCTION, LTD

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS SAARMAN, LLC AND SAARMAN CONSTRUCTION, LTD'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND IN PART AND SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND IN PART. THE DEMURRER TO THE FIRST AND SECOND CAUSES OF ACTION, AS THEY APPLY TO SAARMAN LLC, AND SAARMAN CONSTRUCTION, LTD., IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT TO LEAVE. THE EXCEPTION IN LABOR CODE SECTION 3602(B)(1) REQUIRES A WILLFUL PHYSICAL ASSAULT BY THE EMPLOYER. BECAUSE NEGLIGENCE IS AN UNINTENTIONAL AND NON-WILLFUL TORT, A NEGLIGENT CAUSE OF ACTION CANNOT BE ALLEGED UNDER THE EXCEPTION PROVIDED IN LABOR CODE SECTION 3602(B)(1). THE DEMURRER TO THE THIRD, FOURTH, AND FIFTH CAUSES OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH THIRTY DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND, IF IN GOOD FAITH, PLAINTIFF CAN ALLEGE FACTS THAT SAARMAN LLC, AND SAARMAN CONSTRUCTION, LTD. RATIFIED DEFENDANT RAUL GARCIA'S CONDUCT. AS CURRENTLY PLED, PLAINTIFF MERELY ALLEGES A CONCLUSORY, BOILERPLATE ALLEGATION THAT DEFENDANTS SAARMAN LLC, AND SAARMAN CONSTRUCTION, LTD. "SUBSEQUENTLY RATIFIED THE ACTIONS OF DEFENDANT RAUL GARCIA." (COMPLAINT PAGES 6-9.) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489. (302/EG)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS SAARMAN, LLC AND SAARMAN CONSTRUCTION, LTD'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT - DEFENDANTS SAARMAN LLC, AND SAARMAN CONSTRUCTION, LTD'S MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES IS SUSTAINED, WITH THIRTY DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND, IN LIGHT OF THE COURT'S RULING ON THE DEMURRER. (SINGLE ORDER SIGNED FOR DEMURRER AND MOTION TO STRIKE) JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489. (302/EG)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-04-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Richard Curtis of Law Office James Bachan telephone number 510-286-8900 for Plaintiff Orlando Morales-Juarez.
Donald Sullivan of Wilson Elser Moskowitz Edelman & Dicker LLP telephone number 415-433-0990 for Defendant.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court modified its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS SAARMAN, LLC AND SAARMAN CONSTRUCTION, LTD'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend in part and sustained with leave to amend in part. The demurrer to the first and second causes of action, as they apply to Saarman LLC, and Saarman Construction, LTD., is sustained without to leave. The exception in Labor Code section 3602(b)(1) requires a willful physical assault by the employer. Because negligence is an unintentional and non-willful tort, a negligent cause of action cannot be alleged under the exception provided in Labor Code section 3602(b)(1). The demurrer to the third, fourth, and fifth causes of action is sustained with thirty days leave to amend, if in good faith, Plaintiff can allege facts that Saarman LLC, and Saarman Construction, LTD. ratified Defendant Raul Garcia's conduct. As currently pled, Plaintiff merely alleges a conclusory, boilerplate allegation that Defendants Saarman LLC, and Saarman Construction, LTD. "subsequently ratified the actions of Defendant Raul Garcia." (Complaint pages 6-9.) Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-04-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Richard Curtis of Law Office James Bachan telephone number 510-286-8900 for Plaintiff Orlando Morales-Juarez.
Donald Sullivan of Wilson Elser Moskowitz Edelman & Dicker LLP telephone number 415-433-0990 for Defendant.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court modified its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS SAARMAN, LLC AND SAARMAN CONSTRUCTION, LTD'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT -
Defendants Saarman LLC, and Saarman Construction, LTD'S motion to strike Plaintiff's claim for punitive damages is sustained, with thirty days leave to amend, in light of the court's ruling on the demurrer. (single order signed for demurrer and motion to strike)

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)

DEFENDANTS SAARMAN, LLC, AND SAARMAN CONSTRUCTION, LTD'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to January 4, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302 to give Defendant the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The Court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers.
